name: Lyrics
description: Lyrics plugin that downloads lyrics from lrclib.net with configurable search options
overview: Lyrics plugin with configurable search options and automatic library scanning

versions.changelog:
## v1.6.2.0
### What's New
- Auto-removes the official "LrcLib Lyrics" plugin (`jellyfin-plugin-lrclib`) on startup if installed, since both plugins register the same lyrics provider and conflict. This plugin is a fork that fixes critical issues — see README. The old plugin can be reinstalled later to switch back.

## v1.6.1.0
### What's New
- Lyrics alternative discovery: skip re-downloading lyrics that already failed in a previous run
- Synced-lyric upgrade now checks the existing sidecar file before replacing plain text

### Fixes
- Stop matching instrumental tracks against unrelated songs: honor LRCLIB's instrumental flag, validate every match against requested duration and artist, and drop the track-name-only fuzzy fallback when artist info is available (#40)
- Scheduled task log: split DB-desync skips from "already synced" skips so plain `.txt` sidecars are no longer counted as synced

### Settings
- New configurable duration-tolerance filter (default on, ±15s) with UI toggle to tune or disable

### Notes
- Jellyfin 10.11.6 or newer is now recommended (see README)

## v1.6.0.0
### What's New
- Added song title cleanup to strip YouTube-style suffixes (Official Music Video, etc.) and duplicate artist names
- Added progressive search fallback: retries with fewer parameters when no results are found
- Added multi-artist support: splits "artist1/artist2" and tries each artist individually
- Replace non-synced lyrics with synced ones when available
- Sped up scheduled lyrics task

### Fixes
- Fixed DI issue with RetryStateStore causing plugin to malfunction on startup
- Fixed fuzzy search failing when album name is missing
- Fixed crash on missing artist or invalid id

### Defaults Changed
- Strict search is now disabled by default
- "Exclude album name" is now enabled by default

## v1.5.0.0
### What's New
- Fixed support for Jellyfin 10.11

## v1.4.0.0
### What's New
- Added support for Jellyfin 10.11

## v1.3.0.0
### What's New
- Fixed a lot of plugin loading issues
- Fixed GitHub Action Workflows

### Technical Improvements
- Consistent versioning across all project files
- Better package compatibility with Jellyfin 10.9.x series
- Improved documentation and installation instructions
